title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews Huawei's announcement of the Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the China-USA semiconductor race. The video discusses how EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding are becoming critical factors as the industry advances toward smaller node sizes.
